parents.subject: LU-19708 lfsck: Add kernel doc style for lfsck (3)

commit.subject: LU-19766 doc: conf_param behavior for newly added targets
commit.message:
LU-19766 doc: conf_param behavior for newly added targets

Update the documentation to clarify that configuration parameters set
using conf_param are not automatically applied to targets added later,
and must be explicitly re-applied for new targets.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Rajeev Mishra <rajeevm@hpe.com>
HPE-bug-id: LUS-13145
Change-Id: If4e41b2f6dba30bf4ff49cb1a2aaa8b31607dfa4
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63530
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
